Full Address

ZIP code 95104 serves the San Jose area in California. Our address generator for ZIP code 95104 creates random but realistic addresses with resident names, street addresses, the correct city of San Jose, state of California, and phone numbers with valid area codes. Each generated address is fresh and unique.

Use our generator for ZIP code 95104 to produce test data for software development, validate address forms, populate demo databases, or create sample addresses for San Jose, California. The generator produces consistent results where the ZIP code, city, and state all match correctly.

All addresses for ZIP code 95104 are randomly generated and fictional. They are intended for testing and educational purposes only. No real personal data is used, stored, or exposed. This makes our generator compliant with privacy best practices and data protection regulations.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our address generator.

What is ZIP code 95104?
ZIP code 95104 covers the San Jose area in California. Our generator produces realistic addresses for this ZIP code.
Where is ZIP code 95104 located?
ZIP code 95104 is located in San Jose, California. You can generate random addresses for this location.
Are addresses for ZIP code 95104 real?
No, addresses generated for ZIP code 95104 are randomly created and fictional. They are for testing purposes only.
Is this tool free?
Yes, our ZIP code address generator is completely free to use with no registration required.
What information is included?
Each address includes a resident name, street address, city, state, ZIP code 95104, phone number, and email address.
How does the ZIP code generator work?
Our generator combines random street names and numbers with ZIP code 95104 to create realistic San Jose addresses.
